title: All the EVs that were discontinued or killed off in the U.S. this year | TechCrunch
summary: The move followed Honda’s decision, announced just a two weeks before, to cancel three EVs planned for the U.S. market. Nissan decided last year it would not produce a 2026 model year of its all-electric Ariya SUV for the U.S. market.
